tools.name: search_fish
tools.description: Search fish and aquatic animal profiles in the Atlarium habitat database.

tools.name: get_fish_profile
tools.description: Get a structured fish or aquatic animal profile from the Atlarium habitat database.

tools.name: search_plants
tools.description: Search aquatic plants in the Atlarium database.

tools.name: get_plant_profile
tools.description: Get a structured aquatic plant profile.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search public habitat products in the Atlarium database.

tools.name: get_product_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public habitat product profile.

tools.name: check_species_compatibility
tools.description: Check basic compatibility information between habitat species using Atlarium data.

tools.name: get_water_parameters
tools.description: Get recommended water parameters for an aquatic species or plant.

tools.name: suggest_species_for_tank
tools.description: Suggest compatible aquatic species based on tank size and water parameters.

tools.name: search_guides
tools.description: Search Atlarium habitat guides and educational content.

tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: Get a structured public Atlarium guide.

tools.name: search_algae
tools.description: Search public algae diagnostic profiles with symptoms, causes and treatment guidance.

tools.name: get_algae_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public algae diagnostic profile.

tools.name: search_diseases
tools.description: Search public aquatic disease diagnostic profiles and advisory treatment information.

tools.name: get_disease_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public aquatic disease profile.

tools.name: search_plant_problems
tools.description: Search public aquatic plant deficiency, pest and environmental problem profiles.

tools.name: get_plant_problem_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public aquatic plant problem or deficiency profile.

tools.name: search_medicines
tools.description: Search public aquarium medicine and treatment product profiles.

tools.name: get_medicine_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public aquarium medicine profile.

tools.name: match_diagnostic_profiles
tools.description: Find likely public algae, disease, plant problem and medicine profiles from a symptom query.

tools.name: list_product_categories
tools.description: List public Atlarium product categories for equipment and fertilizers.

tools.name: list_product_brands
tools.description: List public Atlarium product brands.

tools.name: search_equipment
tools.description: Search public aquarium and habitat equipment products.

tools.name: get_equipment_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public equipment product profile.

tools.name: search_fertilizers
tools.description: Search public aquarium fertilizer products and nutrient profiles.

tools.name: get_fertilizer_profile
tools.description: Get a structured public fertilizer product profile.

tools.name: search_fertilization_regimes
tools.description: Search public fertilization regimes and dosing philosophies.

tools.name: get_fertilization_regime
tools.description: Get a structured public fertilization regime.

tools.name: calculate_fertilizer_dose
tools.description: Calculate an advisory fertilizer dose for a public catalog product and tank volume.

tools.name: calculate_nutrient_gaps
tools.description: Compare nutrient targets with supplied measurements without saving user data.

tools.name: calculate_weekly_dose_totals
tools.description: Calculate weekly fertilizer totals for a supplied non-persistent dosing plan.

tools.name: generate_fertilization_plan
tools.description: Generate an advisory non-persistent fertilization plan from public Atlarium catalog data.

tools.name: calculate_tank_volume
tools.description: Calculate gross and net aquarium volume estimates from dimensions.

tools.name: calculate_tank_weight
tools.description: Calculate advisory aquarium weight estimates from dimensions and material inputs.

tools.name: calculate_water_change
tools.description: Calculate water change volume, weekly totals and dilution estimates.

tools.name: calculate_water_chemistry
tools.description: Calculate public water chemistry conversions, CO2, salinity and water-mix estimates.

tools.name: convert_units
tools.description: Convert aquarium-relevant temperature, length, weight and volume units.

tools.name: calculate_equipment_requirements
tools.description: Calculate advisory heater, lighting and electricity requirements.

tools.name: suggest_habitat_for_tank
tools.description: Suggest a complete public habitat plan with species, plants, products, warnings, motivations and related guides.
